center.name: 内格罗河省 (阿根廷)
center.summary: 内格罗河省 (阿根廷)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括Austral rail、斑喉隐蜂鸟、White-chinned jacamar等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The austral rail is patchily distributed in southern Chile's Magallanes Region and in southern Argentina between the departments of Río Negro and Santa Cruz

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bay-capped wren-spinetail is found from extreme southern Brazil south through Uruguay into northern Argentina as far south as Río Negro Province. It also has occurred as a non-breeder in Paraguay. It inhabits reedbeds and sedges in freshwater, brackish, and saltwater marshes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: certhoides is found in northeastern Argentina from Río Negro Province north to Formosa Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Argentina it occurs along the eastern slope of the Andes south to Río Negro Province and on the Atlantic to Buenos Aires Province. It has also been recorded as a vagrant in Chile and on the Falkland Islands. The creamy-bellied thrush inhabits a wide variety of semi-open to open landscapes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Records in Chubut and Rio Negro may correspond to a population that is no extinct. It inhabits temperate grasslands usually near marshes, both fresh and brackish

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The spot-winged falconet is found from Bolivia's Santa Cruz Department south through Paraguay into Argentina as far south as Río Negro Province. Sight records in Uruguay unconfirmed by photographs or specimens lead the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society to treat it as hypothetical in that country. The spot-winged falconet inhabits the Gran Chaco in mostly-open landscapes such as savanna and semi-arid woodlands; all are characterized by scrub with scattered trees

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Steinbach's canastero is found in western Argentina from southern Salta Province south to Neuquén and Río Negro provinces.Areta, J.I., Hernández, I., Prieto, J., Delhey, K

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in lowland southern Bolivia, in western Paraguay, in northeastern and central Argentina as far south as Río Negro Province, in essentially all of Uruguay, and in Brazil's southernmost state of Rio Grande do Sul

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in eastern and southern Bolivia, most of Paraguay, northern and eastern Argentina south to Río Negro Province, adjacent southern Brazil, and western Uruguay

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: mentalis is found further east, along both banks of the Solimões (upper Amazon) River to its confluences with the Negro and Madeira Rivers. The white-chinned jacamar inhabits shrubby borders and openings in terra firme, várzea, and gallery forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in southern Colombia, eastern Ecuador and Peru, northern and eastern Bolivia, Paraguay, western Uruguay, southern Guyana, northern and central Argentina to Río Negro Province, and Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: amazonicus is found in north-central Brazil along the Amazon River east of the Negro River

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in coastal southeastern and far southern Brazil and in Bolivia, Paraguay, Uruguay, and Argentina as far south as Río Negro Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The firewood-gatherer is found in Brazil from Goiás and Minas Gerais south through Rio Grande do Sul, central and eastern Paraguay, essentially all of Uruguay, and northern Argentina from Formosa and Misiones provinces south to Río Negro Province
